onboarding.warmup: For Veloseller to start calculating TVelo, it needs daily records of your SKUs. Meaningful numbers come after 7 days, the most accurate after 30. We'll email you summary reports for those dates.
onboarding.step1.title: Connect a data source
onboarding.step1.desc: Google Sheet, Ozon or Wildberries API
onboarding.step2.title: First data records
onboarding.step2.desc: Sync will run automatically after connecting
onboarding.step3.title: Wait for recalculation
onboarding.step3.desc: Sync runs every 6 hours, or click «Recalculate now» on the dashboard
onboarding.doneTitle: 🎉 Done! Veloseller is calculating your sales velocity.
